description: Opinionated web application pipeline — from project setup to go-live

milestones.name: {prefix}: Foundation
milestones.description: Project scaffolding, tooling, and base UI structure

phases.name: Project Setup
phases.description: Scaffold project structure, install dependencies, configure development tooling and CI basics

issues.title: Set up {project_name} project structure
issues.description: Initialize the project repository with package manager, directory layout, and essential configuration files

issues.title: Configure development tooling and linting
issues.description: Set up linter, formatter, TypeScript config (if applicable), and git hooks for consistent code quality

issues.title: Create initial README and documentation
issues.description: Write project README with setup instructions, architecture overview, and contributing guidelines

phases.name: UI Scaffold
phases.description: Build core layout, navigation shell, and foundational UI components that all features will use

issues.title: Implement core layout and navigation
issues.description: Create the application shell with header, sidebar/navigation, and main content area with responsive breakpoints

issues.title: Build base UI components
issues.description: Create reusable component library: buttons, forms, cards, modals, and loading states

issues.title: Set up routing and page structure
issues.description: Configure client-side routing, create page shells for all primary views, and implement 404 handling

milestones.name: {prefix}: Core Features
milestones.description: Primary feature implementation with data layer and API integration

phases.name: Core Implementation
phases.description: Implement the primary features, data layer, state management, and API integration that deliver the app's core value

issues.title: Implement primary feature set
issues.description: Build the core features that deliver {project_name}'s main value proposition as described: {description}

issues.title: Build data layer and state management
issues.description: Implement data fetching, caching, and client-side state management for all core features

issues.title: Integrate API endpoints
issues.description: Connect frontend to backend APIs, implement error handling, loading states, and optimistic updates

milestones.name: {prefix}: Polish & Ship
milestones.description: Quality assurance, performance optimization, and production deployment

phases.name: Testing & Polish
phases.description: Add test coverage, fix edge cases, optimize performance, and ensure accessibility compliance

issues.title: Add test coverage for core features
issues.description: Write unit tests for business logic, integration tests for API layer, and component tests for critical UI flows

issues.title: Fix edge cases and error handling
issues.description: Address error states, empty states, boundary conditions, and network failure scenarios

issues.title: Optimize performance and accessibility
issues.description: Run Lighthouse audit, optimize bundle size, add lazy loading, and fix accessibility issues (WCAG 2.1 AA)

phases.name: Go Live
phases.description: Configure deployment pipeline, run final review, and launch to production

issues.title: Configure deployment pipeline
issues.description: Set up CI/CD, environment variables, production build configuration, and deployment target

issues.title: Final review and launch checklist
issues.description: Complete pre-launch checklist: security review, SEO basics, analytics, error tracking, and monitoring
